Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import json
import re
import sys

def extract_layout_details\(file_path, label\):
    print\(f"\\n{'='*100}"\)
    print\(f"{label}"\)
    print\(f"{'='*100}\\n"\)
    
    with open\(file_path, 'r'\) as f:
        data = json.load\(f\)
        text_content = data[0].get\('text', ''\)
        
        # Extract main container dimensions
        main_match = re.search\(r'<frame[^>]*name="\([^"]*\)"[^>]*width="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*height="\([^"]+\)"\(?![^<]*hidden\)', text_content[:5000]\)
        if main_match:
            print\(f"MAIN CANVAS: {main_match.group\(1\)} - {main_match.group\(2\)}x{main_match.group\(3\)}\\n"\)
        
        # Extract key sections with position and dimensions
        sections = [
            \('Nav header', 'NAVIGATION'\),
            \('Intro content', 'HERO SECTION'\),
            \('Project 5', 'FEARLESS INVENTORY'\),
            \('Project 8', 'SPEEDSTER SECTION'\),
            \('About Section', 'ABOUT SECTION'\),
            \('Footer section', 'FOOTER'\),
        ]
        
        for frame_name, label_name in sections:
            # Find frame with position and dimensions
            pattern = f'<frame[^>]*name="{re.escape\(frame_name\)}"[^>]*x="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*y="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*width="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*height="\([^"]+\)"'
            match = re.search\(pattern, text_content\)
            if match:
                x, y, w, h = match.groups\(\)
                print\(f"{label_name} \({frame_name}\):"\)
                print\(f"  Position: x={x}, y={y}"\)
                print\(f"  Dimensions: {w} x {h}"\)
                
                # Look for text inside this section
                section_end = text_content.find\('</frame>', text_content.find\(frame_name\)\)
                section_text = text_content[text_content.find\(f'name="{frame_name}"'\):section_end+8]
                
                # Find text elements
                text_patterns = re.findall\(r'<text[^>]*width="\([^"]+\)"[^>]*height="\([^"]+\)"', section_text\)
                if text_patterns:
                    print\(f"  Text sizes found: {len\(text_patterns\)}"\)
                    for tw, th in text_patterns[:3]:
                        print\(f"    - {tw} x {th}"\)
                print\(\)

extract_layout_details\('/Users/nathanwituk/.claude/projects/-Users-nathanwituk-Desktop-Claude-Code-UX-Projects-Nathans-Portfolio/636e5d48-fbe4-46f8-8664-7f509ba0bb18/tool-results/mcp-claude_ai_Figma-get_design_context-1773228077862.txt', 'TABLET LAYOUT \(800px\)'\)

EOF)
